mapper.sql: id, deptNo, modelNo, remark, insert_time, insert_user, update_time, update_user, is_deleted, customer_no, supplier_class, fuzzy
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_po_autoSend_remark_config
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert:
insert into dbo.ops_po_autoSend_remark_config
id,
deptNo,
modelNo,
remark,
insert_time,
insert_user,
update_time,
update_user,
is_deleted,
customer_no,
supplier_class,
fuzzy,

mapper.update:
update dbo.ops_po_autoSend_remark_config
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
deptNo = #{record.deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
modelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
insert_time = #{record.insertTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
insert_user = #{record.insertUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_deleted = #{record.isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT},
customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
supplier_class = #{record.supplierClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
fuzzy = #{record.fuzzy,jdbcType=BIT},

update dbo.ops_po_autoSend_remark_config set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, deptNo = #{record.deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, modelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, insert_time = #{record.insertTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, insert_user = #{record.insertUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_deleted = #{record.isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT}, customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, supplier_class = #{record.supplierClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, fuzzy = #{record.fuzzy,jdbcType=BIT}

update dbo.ops_po_autoSend_remark_config
deptNo = #{deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
modelNo = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
insert_time = #{insertTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
insert_user = #{insertUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_deleted = #{isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT},
customer_no = #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
supplier_class = #{supplierClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
fuzzy = #{fuzzy,jdbcType=BIT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.ops_po_autoSend_remark_config set deptNo = #{deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, modelNo = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, insert_time = #{insertTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, insert_user = #{insertUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT}, customer_no = #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, supplier_class = #{supplierClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, fuzzy = #{fuzzy,jdbcType=BIT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
